name: chr2_2q11_BARD1_paralog
description: 2q11 SD region containing pericentric paralogs of BARD1, BUB1 and ANKRD36-family duplicons. Part of the pericentromere-2 SD belt that contributes to recurrent rearrangements across 2q11-q13.

architecture.internal_structure: Pericentric SD blocks of 30-100 kb at 96-99% identity; ANKRD36/ANKRD36B/ANKRD36C and BARD1 paralog signal.
